items.summary: 中國深圳地鐵突然實施更嚴格的安檢新規，有當地居民向BBC中文質疑新規效率及保安實際成效。據報，深圳地鐵指僅負責落實，措施不會長期持續。新規正值APEC峰會舉行前4個月執行。
items.title: APEC前夕四個月，中國深圳地鐵突加強安檢惹民怨

items.summary: Chiefs in Ontario say they were left to self-evacuate before homes burned to ground, after being told there was no imminent threat Fast-moving wildfires have burned two First Nations communities in Canada to the ground, as members said they were left to self-evacuate without government help or…
items.title: We received no alert, say leaders of First Nations communities razed by Canadian wildfires

items.summary: A "state of catastrophe" has been declared in Coquimbo and Huasco following the downpour.

items.summary: Last week, two Chinese AI companies unveiled models they say can credibly compete with the best systems from OpenAI and Anthropic. The response was swift and predictable. Markets wobbled, commentators declared Silicon Valley shooketh, and policymakers reached for the familiar language of arms races…
items.title: America needs to stop getting shocked by Chinese AI

items.summary: The conversation about AI often centers on algorithms, computing power, or huge investments in new semiconductor fabrication plants and hyperscale data centers. But beneath each of these advances is another layer of innovation that makes them possible: advanced materials. Every new generation of AI…
items.title: Advancing next-gen AI with materials science innovation

items.title: Rescuers in Afghanistan search for missing and dead after flash floods destroy homes

items.summary: Thousands of mostly young people tried to march on India's parliament to demand changes to how the education system is run.
items.title: Why are thousands protesting for education reform in India?

items.summary: Global hunger declined for the third year in a row in 2025 but experts call for action to bring down costs of fruit, vegetables and dairy as report shows 2.69bn people can’t afford to eat well One in three people cannot afford to eat a healthy diet, a new report has found, prompting calls for…
items.title: Healthy diet too expensive for one in three people globally, UN report finds

items.summary: BBC中文記者實地考察，在金門西北岸的官澳海灘望去，隔海的翔安機場就在眼前，塔台、航廈與跑道清晰可見，近距離感受遠超一般想像。
items.title: 距離金門僅三公里，廈門翔安機場為何引發台灣國安疑慮？

items.title: 台灣防空演習將首度模擬「斷網」，象徵防衛思維轉型？

items.title: 智能戒指都知道我懷孕了，我還不知道

items.title: 亞洲年輕人大舉押注科技股 他們過得怎麼樣？

items.summary: BBC中文記者實地走訪金門，隔海的廈門翔安機場設施清晰可辨，近距離感受遠超一般想像。這座由中國大陸填海興建的機場，由於位置敏感，正引發台灣對軍事威脅和區域安全的高度關切。
items.title: 金門對面多了一座巨型機場，台灣憂軍事與飛航安全
